name: Saffron Risotto with Sea Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the onion and ginger and sauté until the onion is translucent. Add the rice and stir to coat with the butter.
2. Add the white wine, increase the heat, and cook, stirring, until it is almost absorbed.
3. Gradually add the broth (about 1/2 cup at a time), letting the rice absorb most of each addition before adding more. This process will take about 15 minutes. When making one of the broth additions, steep the saffron in some of the broth in a small cup and incorporate it.
4. The rice should have a creamy consistency with a noticeable light crunch in the center of the kernel. Immediately after the last broth addition, add the scallops and cook for just a few moments (do not overcook them or they will toughen).
5. Season to taste with salt and pepper and serve immediately.
